mapper.insert:
insert into task_detail(id, task_id, sequence, step_name, step_type, step_content, request_params, response_params, execution_status, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.taskId}, #{entity.sequence}, #{entity.stepName}, #{entity.stepType}, #{entity.stepContent}, #{entity.requestParams}, #{entity.responseParams}, #{entity.executionStatus}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
